title: Impact-Metrics
description: Schema for specific, quantifiable impact metrics from a charity.

source.description: A unified, programmatic data structure for referencing the source of an extracted data point.

source_type.description: The strict category of the source document. [ALLOWED VALUES: 'attached_report']

source_index.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 0-based index of the attached document (among all attached documents) where the data was found.

page_number.description: For attached PDF document sources, the 1-based absolute index of the page (in that attached document) where the data was found.

quote.description: The exact verbatim wording quoted from the source, used for verification and text-fragment generation.

metrics.description: A list of specific, quantifiable impact metrics, sorted in descending order of significance.

species_key.description: The species key for moral weight lookup. [ALLOWED VALUES: {{CONCATENATED_SPECIES_KEY_VALUES}}]

intervention_key.description: The intervention key for leverage multiplier lookup. [ALLOWED VALUES: {{CONCATENATED_INTERVENTION_KEY_VALUES}}]

unit_is_individual_animal.description: Whether the unit refers to an individual animal (e.g., 'lives saved', 'vaccinations administered') or a different quantity (e.g., 'tons of feed saved', 'fund raised', 'eggs laid'). This is important for accurate aggregation and comparison across metrics.

evidence_quality.description: The quality of evidence supporting the metric. [ALLOWED VALUES: {{CONCATENATED_EVIDENCE_KEY_VALUES}}]
